scripts.build: pnpm install --no-frozen-lockfile && pnpm --filter @workspace/peps-anonymous run build && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build:compile
scripts.start: pnpm --filter @workspace/db run push-force && sh Product-Landing-Page/scripts/prod-seed-data-run.sh && NODE_ENV=production node Product-Landing-Page/artifacts/api-server/dist/index.cjs
